story.description: A clip of wild animals in nature: majestic deer in woodland landscape
story.hook: Deer can aim each ear toward danger
story.lead: This deer just survived a wolf pack because it didn’t just run—it listened first. Notice how its ears swivel like radar dishes. That’s how it hears predators long before they spot it. It also freezes, not flees, that’s why a deer’s first move is often to stand still. Did you think deer were just pretty.
story.script: This deer just survived a wolf pack because it didn’t just run—it listened first. Notice how its ears swivel like radar dishes. That’s how it hears predators long before they spot it.
